title: Bring Gemini’s intelligence to AlloyDB using AI functions
summary: Google presents AlloyDB AI, which integrates Gemini intelligence into SQL workflows through AI functions like generate, rank, forecast, and summarize. The approach optimizes performance and cost compared to row-at-a-time LLM calls.
writeup: This video covers AlloyDB AI, Google's integration of Gemini intelligence directly into SQL workflows. The capability is exposed through AI functions including generate, rank, forecast, and summarize, which operate within database queries rather than through separate application logic. The stated benefit is performance and cost optimization relative to row-at-a-time LLM calls, where each row triggers an individual model invocation. Related concepts include vector search and test-time optimization.
